hackathon_sections.ai_automation_playground: AI-Automation Playground : Intelligent Task & Workflow Automation (BUSINESS INTELLIGENCE ANALYSTS TRACK)
hackathon_sections.theme_description: Theme: Reimagine Business Intelligence Analyst (BIA) productivity by leveraging AI-powered automation, copilots, and intelligent workflows to streamline business and engineering operations.
hackathon_sections.challenge_goals: Challenge yourself to: - Automate repetitive business processes such as documentation, reporting, and coordination workflows - Design intelligent workflows that integrate multiple systems with minimal manual intervention - Use AI agents to accelerate code generation, testing, and optimization - Build solutions using no-code/low-code platforms alongside AI capabilities - Compare manual vs automated processes with measurable improvements in productivity and turnaround time
hackathon_sections.example_projects: Your project can be anything like real time automated document creator, workflow automation for ticketing, notifications, solution to convert business requirements into structured Jira tickets, intelligent automation tool that reduces manual effort—as long as AI tools meaningfully enhance your process.
hackathon_sections.how_to_create_project: How to Create Project on Garage
